headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a crucial 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 strong innings, striking out 4 batters and allowing 1 earned run. The St. Louis Cardinals also secured a win, defeating the Cleveland Guardians 5-3 behind Alec Burleson's 2 hits and 2 RBIs. The Boston Red Sox rallied past the Minnesota Twins 9-5, with Trevor Story leading the offense.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The Washington Nationals transferred LHP Ken Waldichuk to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness. The Texas Rangers placed RHP Chris Martin on the 15-day injured list with right shoulder impingement, while also placing RHP Luis Curvelo on the 15-day injured list with a right biceps strain. The New York Mets placed LF Jared Young on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 13, 2026, with a left meniscus tear.

Several teams made notable roster moves, including trades. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Take Down Orioles 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured an 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 strong innings, striking out 4 batters and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their recent matchup. Alec Burleson led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs, while Dustin May earned the win and Riley O'Brien secured the save.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rally Past Twins 9-5**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 9-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Trevor Story leading the offense. Story's impressive performance included two hits, one home run, and five RBIs.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Detroit**
top_news.summary: The Kansas City Royals dropped a 1-2 decision to the Detroit Tigers, failing to secure a win. Wenceel Pérez led the Royals' offense with a home run and an RBI, while Seth Lugo pitched 6.2 strong innings for the Royals.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with a strong team effort contributing to the final score. Impact players on both sides included James Wood, Daylen Lile, and Drew Millas for the Nationals, while Nick Gonzales and Oneil Cruz stood out for the Pirates.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Jung Hoo Lee contributing significantly to the team's offense. Landen Roupp was instrumental in the Giants' win, pitching effectively to secure the 3-0 final score.

top_news.title: **Nationals' Waldichuk Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Washington Nationals left-handed pitcher Ken Waldichuk has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
